title: Questions from Quarantine: Politics and Preparedness
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. The series, which airs every Tuesday, is designed to address public inquiries submitted via social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The experts provide guidance on maintaining mental and physical well-being during the global crisis, focusing on themes of politics and preparedness. The article positions the series as a resource for navigating the challenges posed by the pandemic, linking it to broader discussions on global health security and domestic policy responses. The content is promotional, encouraging audience participation and highlighting related expert analyses on topics such as event safety, supply chains, and vaccine research.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目推出每周网络系列节目“隔离期的问题”，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列节目于每周二播出，旨在通过社交媒体话题标签#QuestionsFromQuarantine收集并解答公众提问。专家们就如何在全球危机中保持身心健康提供建议，核心主题围绕政治与防范准备展开。文章将该系列定位为帮助应对疫情挑战的资源，并将其与更广泛的全球健康安全及国内政策应对讨论相联系。内容具有宣传性质，鼓励观众参与，并强调了相关专家对大型活动安全规划、供应链管理以及疫苗研究等议题的分析。
